## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## TDD / testing (required)

- [ ] Tests written or updated **before or with** this change (TDD)
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally
- [ ] New tests cover the changed behavior (not just line coverage)
- [ ] Integration / E2E / smoke tests updated if boundaries changed
- [ ] Manual verification steps documented below (if automated tests N/A)

## Verification

<!-- Commands run, screenshots, or runbook phase (e.g. infra: ./scripts/07-cluster-verify.sh) -->

## Security and compliance

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII in this PR
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed (new or updated)
- [ ] Breaking changes documented

## Documentation and release

- [ ] README / runbook / API docs updated
- [ ] Versioned repo: commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (semantic-release will version on merge to `main`)
- [ ] Infra repo: runbook / verification steps documented (no semver tag expected)
